---
title: "rows"
subtitle: "quarto-revealjs-rows"
format: revealjs
revealjs-plugins:
  - rows
---

## Syntax

The plugin adds `.rows` and `.row` divs that mirror Quarto's built-in `.columns` and `.column`:

```markdown
::: {.rows}
::: {.row}
top
:::
::: {.row}
bottom
:::
:::
```

`.rows` is a vertical flexbox; each `.row` divides the available height evenly.

## Nesting

`.rows` and `.columns` can be nested in either direction. Put rows inside a column:

```markdown
::: {.columns}
::: {.column}
left
:::
::: {.column}
::: {.rows}
::: {.row}
a
:::
::: {.row}
b
:::
:::
:::
:::
```

## Nesting (cont.)

…or columns inside a row:

```markdown
::: {.rows}
::: {.row}
top
:::
::: {.row}
::: {.columns}
::: {.column}
a
:::
::: {.column}
b
:::
:::
:::
:::
```

## Widths

Three or more columns still need explicit widths (a Quarto requirement, not a grid one):

```markdown
::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="33%"}
a
:::
::: {.column width="33%"}
b
:::
::: {.column width="33%"}
c
:::
:::
```

Rows do not need widths — they always divide the available height evenly.

# Examples {.center}

## 2 rows in 1 column

::: {.columns}

::: {.column}

column 1

:::

::: {.column}

::: {.rows}

::: {.row}

row 1

:::

::: {.row}

row 2

:::

:::

:::

:::

## 3 rows in 1 column

::: {.columns}

::: {.column}

column 1

:::

::: {.column}

::: {.rows}

::: {.row}

row 1

:::

::: {.row}

row 2

:::

::: {.row}

row 3

:::

:::

:::

:::

## rows in both columns

::: {.columns}

::: {.column}

::: {.rows}

::: {.row}

left, row 1

:::

::: {.row}

left, row 2

:::

:::

:::

::: {.column}

::: {.rows}

::: {.row}

right, row 1

:::

::: {.row}

right, row 2

:::

::: {.row}

right, row 3

:::

:::

:::

:::

## columns inside a row

::: {.rows}

::: {.row}

top row

:::

::: {.row}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column}

bottom, column 1

:::

::: {.column}

bottom, column 2

:::

:::

:::

:::

## columns inside every row

::: {.rows}

::: {.row}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="33%"}

top, column 1

:::

::: {.column width="33%"}

top, column 2

:::

::: {.column width="33%"}

top, column 3

:::

:::

:::

::: {.row}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column}

bottom, column 1

:::

::: {.column}

bottom, column 2

:::

:::

:::

:::

## 3 columns, rows in the middle

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="33%"}

column 1

:::

::: {.column width="33%"}

::: {.rows}

::: {.row}

row 1

:::

::: {.row}

row 2

:::

::: {.row}

row 3

:::

:::

:::

::: {.column width="33%"}

column 3

:::

:::
